essay_topic: Describe your mid-term and long-term visions for your post-MSc Program in Management career path. What is it about ESADE you think will help you reach your goals?
questions_asked: Considering your B.Com in Accounting and Finance and experience managing logistics at Shree Arihant Transport Company, how will ESADE's Innovation & Entrepreneurship program specifically shape your mid-term and long-term career vision? | Reflecting on your B.Com and Shree Arihant Transport experience, what specific problem within the Indian logistics sector ignites your entrepreneurial vision, and how would ESADE uniquely equip you to solve it? | Considering your B.Com and Shree Arihant Transport experience,  what specific obstacle in achieving your long-term vision for the Indian logistics sector requires the unique resources and network ESADE offers to overcome? | Considering your B.Com and Shree Arihant Transport experience, what specific skill gaps, hindering your vision for a tech-enabled logistics solution, will ESADE's program uniquely address to achieve your long-term career goals? | Considering your B.Com and Shree Arihant Transport experience,  how will ESADE's program uniquely position you to achieve your described mid-term and long-term career visions,  specifically addressing challenges you've encountered?
user_answers: My B.Com in Accounting and Finance has given me a strong foundation in business fundamentals, while managing logistics at Shree Arihant Transport Company exposed me to operational challenges and opportunities for innovation. In the mid-term, ESADE’s Innovation & Entrepreneurship program will equip me with tools to design scalable business models, leverage technology for supply chain efficiency, and cultivate an entrepreneurial mindset. Long-term, I aim to launch a venture that modernizes logistics infrastructure in India, integrating sustainable practices and digital solutions. ESADE’s ecosystem of global peers, incubators, and mentorship will provide the strategic vision, network, and resources to translate my operational experience into impactful entrepreneurial leadership. | One of the biggest problems I observed in Indian logistics is the lack of digital integration across fragmented transport operators, leading to inefficiencies, delays, and high costs. My experience at Shree Arihant Transport highlighted how even mid-sized firms struggle with real-time tracking, optimized routing, and transparent data flow. This challenge drives my entrepreneurial vision to build a tech-enabled logistics platform that streamlines operations and enhances efficiency. ESADE’s Innovation & Entrepreneurship program will uniquely equip me with the knowledge to design scalable digital solutions, access to incubators to refine my business model, and exposure to global best practices that can be adapted to the Indian context. | A key obstacle in realizing my long-term vision for the Indian logistics sector is the challenge of scaling a tech-enabled solution across a highly fragmented market where adoption of digital tools remains limited. While I understand the operational inefficiencies from my experience at Shree Arihant Transport, transforming these insights into a scalable venture requires global exposure to innovative business models, access to venture ecosystems, and cross-cultural collaboration. ESADE’s unique resources—its Entrepreneurship Lab, startup incubator, and strong network of mentors and industry leaders—will equip me to bridge this gap. They will not only refine my strategy but also provide the partnerships and investor connections necessary to scale an impactful logistics enterprise in India. | While my B.Com and logistics management experience at Shree Arihant Transport gave me strong financial and operational insight, I recognize key skill gaps that hinder my ability to build a tech-enabled logistics venture. Specifically, I need expertise in entrepreneurial strategy, digital innovation, and venture financing to transform operational knowledge into a scalable business. ESADE’s Innovation & Entrepreneurship program will uniquely address these gaps through its emphasis on hands-on venture creation, courses in digital business models, and access to incubators and investors. These resources will equip me to design, fund, and scale a technology-driven logistics solution, enabling me to achieve my long-term goal of modernizing India’s logistics sector. | My B.Com provided me with financial and analytical foundations, while my role at Shree Arihant Transport exposed me to operational inefficiencies such as fragmented supply chains, lack of technology adoption, and limited scalability in logistics operations. These challenges shaped my mid-term goal of developing a tech-enabled logistics platform to streamline operations and my long-term vision of scaling it into a sustainable enterprise that modernizes India’s logistics sector. ESADE’s Innovation & Entrepreneurship program uniquely positions me to achieve this by offering hands-on exposure to venture creation, access to incubators and accelerators to refine solutions, and mentorship from global entrepreneurs who have scaled businesses across similar fragmented industries. Its ecosystem will not only provide the strategic frameworks and entrepreneurial skills I lack but also the network and investor connections necessary to overcome the structural barriers I have experienced firsthand.

essay_topic: Describe your mid-term and long-term visions for your post-MSc Program in Management career path. What is it about ESADE you think will help you reach your goals?
questions_asked: How will ESADE's innovation and entrepreneurship focus uniquely equip you, leveraging your B.Com and Shree Arihant experience, to achieve your envisioned mid- and long-term career goals? | What single experience at Shree Arihant Transport Company crystallized your vision for your post-MSc career, and how will ESADE uniquely support its realization? | What unforeseen obstacle at Shree Arihant Transport Company forced you to re-evaluate your  mid-term and long-term career visions, and how will ESADE help you overcome similar future challenges? | What specific ESADE resource will best bridge your existing logistics expertise from Shree Arihant Transport and your  post-MSc career vision? | How will ESADE's resources uniquely accelerate your post-MSc vision – leveraging your Shree Arihant experience – to achieve measurable impact within five years?
user_answers: My B.Com in Accounting and Finance equipped me with a strong grounding in business fundamentals, while my experience managing logistics at Shree Arihant Transport gave me first-hand insight into the operational inefficiencies and technological gaps within India’s logistics sector. These experiences shaped my mid-term goal of building a scalable, tech-enabled logistics platform and my long-term vision of modernizing supply chains across India through sustainable and data-driven solutions. ESADE’s strong focus on innovation and entrepreneurship will uniquely prepare me to achieve these goals by sharpening my ability to design disruptive business models, exposing me to global best practices, and connecting me with mentors and peers who have successfully scaled ventures in fragmented industries. ESADE’s Innovation & Entrepreneurship program will uniquely support this by giving me hands-on exposure to venture creation, access to its incubators to refine my solution, and a global network of mentors and investors to scale it into a sustainable enterprise. | While overseeing operations at Shree Arihant Transport Company, I faced an unforeseen obstacle when a sudden regulatory change disrupted cross-state shipments, exposing how vulnerable logistics operations are to external uncertainties and the lack of adaptive systems. This forced me to re-evaluate my mid-term vision—not just to digitize logistics processes, but to design resilient, technology-driven solutions that can adapt to regulatory, infrastructural, and market shocks. It also reshaped my long-term career goal of leading a venture that builds a more transparent, flexible, and sustainable logistics ecosystem in India. ESADE’s Innovation & Entrepreneurship program will help me overcome such future challenges by training me to think strategically under uncertainty, exposing me to global case studies of disruption, and providing access to entrepreneurial labs and mentors who can guide me in building scalable, adaptable business models. | The ESADE Entrepreneurship Institute and its associated incubator will be the most critical resource in bridging my logistics expertise with my post-MSc career vision. While my experience at Shree Arihant Transport gave me deep insight into operational inefficiencies, I need structured guidance to translate these learnings into a scalable, tech-driven venture. ESADE’s incubator will provide the mentorship, investor access, and hands-on environment to refine my business model, test innovative solutions, and ultimately transform my operational experience into a sustainable logistics enterprise. | My experience at Shree Arihant Transport exposed me to the inefficiencies caused by fragmented logistics operations and limited digital adoption, inspiring my post-MSc vision of building a tech-enabled platform that streamlines supply chains in India. ESADE’s resources—particularly the Entrepreneurship Institute, its startup incubator, and access to mentors and investors—will uniquely accelerate this journey by helping me refine my business model, secure early-stage funding, and test scalable solutions in real-world markets. By combining my operational expertise with ESADE’s entrepreneurial ecosystem, I will be positioned to transform logistics inefficiencies into measurable, technology-driven improvements.
